channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: China-Zimbabwe health partnership delivers new hope to patients
item.description: China-Zimbabwe health partnership delivers new hope to patients — via China Daily #Zimbabwe #Health #ZimbabweHealth #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe courts global investors at World Economic Forum
item.description: FINANCE Minister Mthuli Ncube has showcased Zimbabwe’s economic performance and investment opportunities at the 17th Annual Meeting of the New Champions in Dalian, China, as the government intensifies efforts to attract foreign direct investment. Addressing delegates at the World Economic Forum event, Ncube said Zimbabwe’s economic fundamentals remained strong, citing newly released data showing the [...] The post Zimbabwe courts global investors at World Economic Forum appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chiredzi man accused of insulting Mnangagwa, Chivayo in viral video granted US$200 bail @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A 32-year-old Chiredzi resident, Tafadzwa Nelton Matanhuse, who spent two nights in custody after a video of him allegedly criticizing President Emmerson Mnangagwa and controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo went viral, has been granted US$200 bail. Matanhuse is facing charges of inciting public violence. He appeared before Chiredzi magistrate Tendai Mutamba on Thursday, who ruled that [...] The post Chiredzi man accused of insulting Mnangagwa, Chivayo in viral video granted US$200 bail appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Harare lawyer flagged for writing letter to Mnangagwa to arm-twist courts in property feud
item.description: A HARARE-based legal practitioner Kundai Gloria Gumbo is under scrutiny after a businessman lodged a formal complaint with the Law Society of Zimbabwe (LSZ) accusing her of breaching professional ethics by seeking executive intervention in a High Court matter. Gumbo, who represents Kurt Louis Heyns in a protracted ownership wrangle, is accused by Believe Guta, [...] The post Harare lawyer flagged for writing letter to Mnangagwa to arm-twist courts in property feud appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: RTG revenue hits US$11,4m in first quarter of 2026
item.description: Rainbow Tourism Group (RTG) recorded revenue of US$11.4 million in the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 supported by stronger performance across its resort operations, city hotels and tour activities. In a trading update, the hospitality group said occupancy increased to 51% from 48% a year earlier, while revenue per available room (RevPAR) rose 19% [...] The post RTG revenue hits US$11,4m in first quarter of 2026 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Five injured as train slams into kombi in Chiredzi days after fatal bus collision
item.description: Five people were injured after a minibus was struck by a National Railways of Zimbabwe (NRZ) train at a level crossing in Chiredzi on Thursday evening. According to the NRZ, the accident occurred at a level crossing in Nandi, Chiredzi, leaving three men and two women with varying degrees of injuries. The injured passengers were [...] The post Five injured as train slams into kombi in Chiredzi days after fatal bus collision appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe mining investment rising steadily and extends beyond lithium
item.description: Although Zimbabwe has endured more than two decades of frequent bad press linked to its politics, the negative headlines have not prevented billions of dollars in mining foreign direct investment from flowing into the country since the post-Robert Mugabe era began with the late strongman’s ouster in a military-assisted transition in November 2017. Since 2023, the Zimbabwe Investment and Development Centre has issued new mining licences worth $3.52-billion, while existing mining companies are undertaking massive expansion projects. For example, Zimplats, a unit of South Africa’s Impala Platinum, has invested more than $750-million in expansion, beneficiation, and energy projects, while Mimosa, another South African-owned platinum group metals (PGMs) miner, is investing more than $200-million. (via Australasia Global Mining News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Australasia Global Mining News

item.title: Sengezo Tshabangu Pushes To End By-Elections As Fresh Recall Fears Grow
item.description: Tshabangu’s New Election Plan Sparks Fresh Recall Fears In Parliament Sengezo Tshabangu has urged lawmakers to change Zimbabwe’s Constitution to stop by-elections between general elections, arguing that political parties should simply replace recalled or deceased legislators instead of sending voters back to the polls. His proposal came as the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill (No. [...] The post Sengezo Tshabangu Pushes To End By-Elections As Fresh Recall Fears Grow appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Tshabangu presses Zanu PF for law change to scrap by-elections @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Rumoured to be planning fresh recalls, Tshabangu wants to fill vacancies without contest The post Tshabangu presses Zanu PF for law change to scrap by-elections appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Zimbabwe gas discovery could power 500MW plant for 1,000 years @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s proven natural gas resources in Mzarabani could generate enough electricity to power a 500-megawatt power station for up to 1,000 years, highlighting the enormous potential of the Cabora Ba... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Stealing fish in Lake Chivero ends in tears: Norton man now disabled after fighting with a deadly crocodile for 30 minutes
item.description: The Cost of a Catch: A Thirty-Minute Battle for Survival in the Jaws of a Chivero Predator NORTON — For Garikayi Chiweshe, the silence of the pre-dawn mist over Lake Chivero is no longer a source of peace. Instead, it is the backdrop to a nightmare that plays on a loop every time he closes [...] The post Stealing fish in Lake Chivero ends in tears: Norton man now disabled after fighting with a deadly crocodile for 30 minutes first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
